sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62393" key="leontiano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντ-ιανός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, Astrol., <sense id="n62393.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born under the sign Leo,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
